---
title: "Medium " 
description: "A milestone, I guess?" 
author: "Muhammad Zamharir"     
date: "2025-10-13"     
categories: [Other]     
image: "medium.png"     
---

## What's New?

Hi peeps 🙌🏼, so this young man has decided to opened his first ever medium account to share his toughs and polished his writing 📝. You can find my articles in this link, enjoy the reading xixixi.

## Account Link🔗

https://medium.com/\@zamharirrojafi
